# FutureStack 2026 — Email Copy

**Generated by: Marketing & Communications skill**

## Email 1: Event Announcement

**Subject line:** FutureStack 2026 is official -- and early-bird tickets are live

**Preview text:** Two days of AI infrastructure, 800 engineers, Austin this October. Save $200 when you register today.

**Body:**

Hi {{first_name}},

We are thrilled to announce **FutureStack 2026** -- the premier conference for engineers and leaders building the infrastructure layer of AI.

**October 15--16, 2026 | Austin Convention Center | Austin, TX**

This year's theme is **AI Infrastructure**: the systems, tooling, and architecture decisions that determine whether AI actually works in production. We are bringing together 800 practitioners, researchers, and technical leaders for two days of deep-dive sessions, hands-on workshops, and the kind of hallway conversations that change how you think about your stack.

Here is what to expect:

- **Keynote and plenary sessions** from leaders at the frontier of AI systems
- **Technical tracks** covering inference optimization, training infrastructure, data pipelines, MLOps, and GPU orchestration
- **Hands-on workshops** where you build, not just listen
- **Networking events** designed for real connections, not awkward badge-scanning

**Tickets are on sale now**, and early-bird pricing is available for a limited time:

| Tier | Price |
|------|-------|
| Early-Bird | **$395** (save $200) |
| Standard | $595 |
| VIP | $1,295 (includes speaker dinner, front-row seating, exclusive lounge) |
| Student | $95 (valid .edu email required) |

Early-bird pricing closes September 5. Do not wait on this one.

[**Register Now at Early-Bird Price -->**](https://futurestack2026.com/register)

We will be announcing speakers, sessions, and sponsors over the coming weeks. Stay tuned.

See you in Austin,
The FutureStack Team

## Email 2: Speaker Spotlight

**Subject line:** Dr. Amara Osei from DeepMind will keynote FutureStack 2026

**Preview text:** "The next bottleneck in AI isn't algorithms -- it's infrastructure." Hear her make the case live in Austin.

**Body:**

Hi {{first_name}},

We have been waiting to share this one.

**Dr. Amara Osei**, Principal Research Scientist at **DeepMind**, will deliver the opening keynote at FutureStack 2026.

Dr. Osei leads DeepMind's Infrastructure Research group, where her team has pioneered new approaches to distributed training systems, fault-tolerant inference architectures, and the resource scheduling frameworks behind some of the largest model deployments in the world. Her work has directly shaped how production AI systems handle scale -- and she is coming to Austin to share what she has learned.

**Her keynote: "Building the Foundations That Don't Break"**

In this talk, Dr. Osei will cover:

- Why infrastructure engineering -- not model architecture -- is becoming the primary constraint on AI progress
- Lessons from scaling systems that serve billions of daily inference requests
- A practical framework for deciding when to build vs. buy your AI infrastructure stack
- What the next 3 years of AI infrastructure will demand from engineering teams

This is not a high-level hand-wave. Dr. Osei is known for talks grounded in real systems, real failures, and real solutions. If you are responsible for any part of your organization's AI stack, this is a keynote you will reference for the next year.

**FutureStack 2026 | October 15--16 | Austin Convention Center**

Early-bird tickets ($395, a $200 savings) are still available, but not for long.

[**Secure Your Spot -->**](https://futurestack2026.com/register)

We will be revealing the full session lineup soon. Dr. Osei is just the beginning.

The FutureStack Team

## Email 3: Early-Bird Deadline Reminder (48 Hours Left)

**Subject line:** 48 hours left: early-bird pricing for FutureStack ends Friday at midnight

**Preview text:** $395 becomes $595 at midnight on September 5. This is your last window.

**Body:**

Hi {{first_name}},

Quick note -- the numbers are simple on this one.

**FutureStack 2026 early-bird pricing closes at 11:59 PM CT on Friday, September 5.** After that, tickets move from **$395 to $595**. That is $200 more for the exact same experience.

Here is what you are getting:

- **Keynote by Dr. Amara Osei** (DeepMind) on the future of AI infrastructure
- **30+ technical sessions** across five tracks: inference, training systems, data pipelines, MLOps, and GPU orchestration
- **Hands-on workshops** with the teams building the tools you actually use
- **800 of the sharpest AI infrastructure engineers** in one building for two days
- **All meals, receptions, and networking events** included

If you have been meaning to register, this is the moment. If you need to get approval from your manager, forward them this email -- a $200 savings tends to accelerate procurement.

[**Register at $395 Before Midnight Friday -->**](https://futurestack2026.com/register)

**Already registered?** Forward this to a colleague. Building AI infrastructure is a team sport.

See you October 15--16 in Austin,
The FutureStack Team

P.S. Student tickets remain available at $95 with a valid .edu email -- share with any grad students or researchers on your team.

## Email 4: Post-Event Thank You + Save the Date

**Subject line:** Thank you, FutureStack 2026 -- here is what comes next

**Preview text:** Slides are live, recordings drop next week, and FutureStack 2027 has a date. Read on.

**Body:**

Hi {{first_name}},

We just wrapped two extraordinary days in Austin, and we want to start with the most important thing: **thank you**.

Thank you for showing up. Thank you for asking hard questions during Q&A. Thank you for sharing what you are building during the hallway conversations. Thank you for making FutureStack what it is -- a community of people who care deeply about getting AI infrastructure right.

Here is what you need to know right now:

**Slides and resources**
All speaker slides and workshop materials are now available in the [FutureStack 2026 Resource Hub](https://futurestack2026.com/resources). Bookmark it -- we will be adding materials throughout the week.

**Session recordings**
Full session recordings will be published by **October 24**. Registered attendees get exclusive early access before we open them to the public.

**Share your feedback**
We read every single response. Your feedback directly shapes next year's program. It takes about 4 minutes.

[**Complete the Feedback Survey -->**](https://futurestack2026.com/survey)

**Stay connected**
Join the [FutureStack Community Slack](https://futurestack2026.com/slack) to keep the conversations going. Several speakers have already offered to do follow-up AMAs there.

---

**And finally -- save the date.**

**FutureStack 2027 | October 14--15, 2027 | Austin Convention Center**

We are already working on next year. If you want first access to early-bird pricing and speaker announcements, you are on the list -- we will reach out before tickets go public.

It was an honor to host you. Now go build something extraordinary.

With gratitude,
**Sara Chen**, General Chair
and the entire FutureStack Team

P.S. Had a great experience? A quick post on LinkedIn or X tagging **#FutureStack2026** helps more than you know. We would love to amplify your takeaways.
